category_sources: source_facts.description says convert CloneCD images to ISO images; official SourceForge project summary describes ccd2iso as a CloneCD image to ISO image file converter.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is ccd2iso; official SourceForge project is named ccd2iso.
docs_sources: Official SourceForge project page is the best official documentation surface found; official files page hosts release archives.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official SourceForge project and files pages provide release downloads but no official source-control repository URL.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies CloneCD-to-ISO conversion; official SourceForge project details list command-line UI, C language, and File Systems category.
